title: hieracium cydoniifolium subsp. sulgeri
intro: Hieracium cydoniifolium subsp. sulgeri, also known as Sulger's hawkweed, is a rare and endangered plant species belonging to the dandelion family. It is used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sulger's hawkweed are believed to include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Sulger's hawkweed include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
